No Refund Policy

Please review our course enrollment, fee payments, and refund terms.

Home / No Refund Policy

Refund Policy

All payments made towards our courses/programs are non-refundable.

Once the payment is processed and access to the course, materials, or services is granted, no cancellations or refund requests will be accepted under any circumstances, including:

  • Not attending or completing the course
  • Change of mind or personal reasons
  • Misunderstanding of the course content or structure
  • Delay in placement or interview opportunities
  • Any other reason

Please ensure you understand the course offering and eligibility before making the payment.

Head Office:
2nd Floor, 201, Bhairaav Milestone, Wagle Industrial Estate, Thane West, Maharashtra - 400604
